name: Admin User Remote Logon
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: juju4
SIGMA Title: Admin User Remote Logon
SIGMA Description: Detect remote login by Administrator user (depending on internal pattern).

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=10 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%negotiate%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'admin%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Admin User Remote Logon on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=10 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%negotiate%' AND LOWER("Target Username") LIKE 'admin%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Admin User Remote Logon
